fva._comment_opt_ratio: Fraction of optimal biomass to constrain during FVA (0.9 = 90% of optimal)
fva._comment_workers: Set to null for auto-detection (uses all CPU cores)
fva._comment_chunk_size: Number of reactions per task. null = auto-calculate. Larger = less overhead but less load balancing

simulated_annealing._comment_conservative: CONSERVATIVE SETTINGS - smaller perturbations to avoid optimization failures
simulated_annealing._comment_temperature: Lower starting temp (0.5) for smaller initial perturbations
simulated_annealing._comment_cooling_rate: Slower cooling (0.95) to allow more gradual convergence
simulated_annealing._comment_change_threshold: Very small threshold (0.01%) to detect tiny improvements
simulated_annealing._comment_biomass_goal: Lower, more achievable target (0.2) to avoid unrealistic expectations
simulated_annealing._comment_n_top_enzymes: Fewer enzymes (50) to reduce complexity and avoid conflicts
simulated_annealing._comment_adaptive: Disabled adaptive features until basic algorithm works reliably
